name: Reduced Multi-Center Tension Network
scope: Conditional slender-neck reduction of C-317, not literal intact proton geometry and not yet a nuclear force law.
equal_tension_result: Three equal tensions meet at 120 degrees when an interior junction exists.
nuclear_warning: Inter-nucleon coupling bridge must be derived before carbon or isotope use.
claim_gate_detail: YELLOW (N=3 reduced geometry) / GREEN (N>3 and nuclear application)
